---
description: "Technical design decisions — data strategy, model architecture, risk alignment"
agent: hfd.designaligner
---

Make technical design decisions for this ML project. Walk through each
decision area one at a time, grilling the model architecture choice in
area 2. Every decision must cite docs/blind-research.md findings.

Context the user should provide:
- What concerns them most about the data or model approach
- What the team has experience with (frameworks, libraries)
- Whether to start simple or go for the target architecture
- Inference latency or resource constraints
